rulings.Case Title: LARRY GLADDEN VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P)AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Joinder To Vida'S Saving Center'S Mo To Dismiss Pursuant To California Code Of Civil Procedure Sections 583.410 And 583.420 And California Rule Of Court 3.1342.
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, October 5, 2011 in Department 503 at 9:30 a.m., Line 1. Defendant Consolidated Electrical Distributors, Inc.¿s joinder defendant Vida Savings Center¿s motion to dismiss for failure to prosecute is denied without prejudice. The underlying motion was taken off calendar and defendant¿s joinder failed to provide proper notice pursuant to CRC 3.1342. Defendant may re-file to comply with the notice provisions of CRC 3.1342. If a hearing is requested, it will be at 9:45am in Dept. 503, not 9:30am in Dept. 220. A court reporter will not be provided by the court. = (503/TLJ)

rulings.Case Title: KEVIN STUCKART et al VS. AC AND S, INC. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Amended Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Service Of Summons
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, October 5, 2011 in Department 503 at 9:30 a.m., Line 2. Specially appearing defendant Six States Distributors, Inc.¿s motion to quash service of summons is continued to January 11, 2012 to allow plaintiff to conduct discovery on the issue of personal jurisdiction. Supplemental opposition papers, if any, to be filed and served by December 28, 2011. Supplemental reply papers, if any, to be filed and served by January 4, 2012. If a hearing is requested, it will be at 9:45 a.m. in Dept. 503. No court reporter will be provided by the court. = (503/TLJ)

rulings.Case Title: JAMES NASH VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, October 5, 2011 in Department 503 at 9:30 a.m., Line 3. Defendant Weston Builders Supply Company¿s motion for summary judgment is denied. Defendant did not satisfy its burden of production that plaintiff does not possess and cannot reasonably obtain evidence that he was exposed to asbestos-containing products or materials attributable to defendant. Plaintiff¿s responses to defendant¿s special interrogatories preclude defendant from successfully invoking the factually devoid prong of Aguilar. If a hearing is requested, it will be at 9:45am in Dept. 503, not 9:30am in Dept. 220. A court reporter will not be provided by the court. = (503/TLJ)

rulings.Case Title: JOHN SANTILLAN VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B*P) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, October 5, 2011 in Department 503 at 9:30 a.m., Line 4. Defendant J-M Manufacturing Company, Inc.¿s motion for summary judgment is denied. Plaintiff¿s deposition testimony and declaration, defendant¿s responses to General Order 129 interrogatories and the deposition testimony of Mr. Reichert (plaintiffs¿ Exhibit C) create a triable issue whether plaintiff was exposed to asbestos-containing pipe attributable to defendant. Defendant¿s objections to Mr. Santillan¿s declaration are overruled. If a hearing is requested, it will be at 9:45am in Dept. 503, not 9:30am in Dept. 220. A court reporter will not be provided by the court. = (503/TLJ)

rulings.Case Title: JUAN CRUZ HINOJOSA et al VS. A.W. CHESTERTON COMPANY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION And Notice Of Motion To Quash Service Of Summons And First Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, October 5, 2011 in Department 503 at 9:30 a.m., Line 5. Defendant Huebsch Services¿ motion to quash service of summons is granted. The court had previously continued the hearing on this motion to allow plaintiffs to conduct discovery on the issue of personal jurisdiction. Supplemental opposition papers, if any, were due by September 23, 2011. Plaintiffs did not file any supplemental opposition papers. Plaintiffs failed to meet their burden of proof of demonstrating that defendant had sufficient contacts with California to allow the court to exercise jurisdiction. If a hearing is requested, it will be at 9:45am in Dept. 503, not 9:30am in Dept. 220. A court reporter will not be provided by the court. = (503/TLJ)
